items.title: Write Once, Set Up Anywhere: Dev Environment Automation with Ansible - Lily O. | code.talks 2025
items.author: code.talks (ehem. Developer Conference)
items.content:
<article>Setting up a development environment is always a time-consuming task — especially when joining a new workplace or when juggling different platforms like macOS, Linux, or WSL. In this talk, we’ll explore how to use Ansible to automate developer setups across systems, making onboarding and re-installation fast, consistent, and stress-free. 

You’ll learn how to structure your playbooks, manage platform-specific differences, and keep your setup reproducible and version-controlled. Whether you're bootstrapping a personal machine or managing team-wide configs, this talk will give you practical tools to stop setting things up by hand and start scripting it all.</article>
